title: Pavlovian Go/No-Go
description: Measure response inhibition: respond to Go stimuli, withhold to No-Go stimuli.
instructions:
On each trial, a letter will appear briefly.

If you see 'O' (Go trial): Press the SPACEBAR as fast as you can.
If you see 'X' (No-Go trial): Do NOT press any key.

Try to be both fast and accurate. You have a limited time to respond.
debrief:
This task measures response inhibition — your ability to stop a pre-planned response. Key metrics:

• Go RT: average reaction time on Go trials
• Commission errors: pressing on No-Go trials (failure to inhibit)
• Omission errors: failing to press on Go trials

Widely used in ADHD research and impulse control studies.
